creator: solidwarea@outlook.com
text:
Quick background:
This bug does not persist on a fresh install of FreeBSD release 14.1, using the same rc.conf and loader.conf settings and the same wpa_supplicant file on FreeBSD release 14.2 will throw an error.

Driver: rtw880

Setup:
Setup instructions according to the handbook + rtw88 specific settings (works absolutely fine on FreeBSD 14.1)

wpa_supplicant:
network={
ssid="ValidSSID"
psk="ValidPSK"
}

rc.conf:
hostname="example.example.example"
sshd_enable="YES"
moused_nondefault_enable="NO"
dumpdev="AUTO"
zfs_enable="YES"
wlans_rtw880="wlan0"
ifconfig_wlan0="WPA DHCP" #(WPA SYNCDHCP has also been tried)

loader.conf:
kern.geom.label.disk_ident.enable="0"
kern.geom.label.gptid.enable="0"
cryptodev_load="YES"
zfs_load="YES"
compat.linuxkpi.skb.mem_limit=1
